name: IRC_CAMP_ASSETS_B
description: Stores the assets for a campaign

columns.Name: ASSET_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: SEND_IMMEDIATELY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the Send Immediately flag for scheduled asset is enabled.

columns.Name: CAMPAIGN_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_CAMPAIGNS_B table.

columns.Name: ASSET_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the type of the asset. Lookup type - ORA_IRC_CAMP_ASSET_TYPE

columns.Name: ASSET_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the status of the asset.

columns.Name: PARENT_ASSET_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ASSET_ID of the parent asset.

columns.Name: SCHEDULED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the scheduled date on which the asset should be processed

columns.Name: AUDIENCE_DERIVED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the audience is already derived for this asset

columns.Name: MESSAGE_DESIGN_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key reference to IRC_MSG_DESIGNS_B table. Stores reference to the email design.

columns.Name: SITE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Specifies the targeted site for the Social Media Post

columns.Name: START_DELIVERY_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores start Delivery date for the asset

columns.Name: LAST_DELIVERY_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores last Delivery date for the asset

columns.Name: FOLLOWUP_DELAY
columns.Comments: Delay after Sending the Primary Asset in Days

columns.Name: ASSET_FREQUENCY
columns.Comments: Stores the scheduled frequency in Days.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: PUBLISH_DEST_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the destination of the post. Lookup type - ORA_HCO_CAMP_POST_DESTINATION.
